revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十九]][[zh:七月十九]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 19|qq=July 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1189|en|1189|qid=Q19735|lt=1189|1=1189}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} departed from Kamakura to pursue {{ill|Fujiwara no Yasuhira|en|Fujiwara no Yasuhira|qid=Q3090682|lt=Fujiwara Tadayoshi|1=Fujiwara no Yasuhira}} in Oshu Hiraizumi. * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1492|en|1492|qid=Q6679|lt=1492|1=1492}} {{ill|August 12|en|August 12|qid=Q2777|lt=August 12|1=August 12}}) – Due to epidemics and other calamities, the era name was changed from {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|qid=Q431465|lt=Entoku|1=Entoku}} to {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}}. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}}) – The incident known as the {{ill|Kinmon incident|en|Kinmon incident|qid=Q139871|lt=Kinmon no Hen|1=Kinmon incident}} (also called the Hama Gate Incident) occurred.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Shōhei (era)|Shōhei]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|931|en|931|qid=Q24789|lt=931|1=931}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Emperor Uda|en|Emperor Uda|qid=Q349267|lt=Emperor Uda|1=Emperor Uda}}, the 59th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|867|en|867|qid=Q30347|lt=867|1=867}}). * {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|qid=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|893|en|893|qid=Q24762|lt=893|1=893}} {{ill|September 3|en|September 3|qid=Q2860|lt=September 3|1=September 3}}) – {{ill|Ariwara no Yukihira|en|Ariwara no Yukihira|qid=Q1320521|lt=Ariwara no Yukihira|1=Ariwara no Yukihira}}, a waka poet (born {{ill|818|en|818|qid=Q25083|lt=818|1=818}}). * [[Chian (era)|Chian]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1021|en|1021|qid=Q19257|lt=1021|1=1021}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yorimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yorimitsu|qid=Q590523|lt=Minamoto no Yorimitsu|1=Minamoto no Yorimitsu}}, a military commander and close aide to Fujiwara no Michinaga (born {{ill|948|en|948|qid=Q24318|lt=948|1=948}}). * {{ill|Kajō|en|Kajō|qid=Q1193892|lt=Kashō|1=Kajō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1107|en|1107|qid=Q19511|lt=1107|1=1107}} {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Horikawa|en|Emperor Horikawa|qid=Q464267|lt=Emperor Horikawa|1=Emperor Horikawa}}, the 73rd Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1079|en|1079|qid=Q19445|lt=1079|1=1079}}). * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|qid=Q1194250|lt=Genryaku|1=Genryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1184|en|1184|qid=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}} {{ill|August 26|en|August 26|qid=Q2820|lt=August 26|1=August 26}}) – {{ill|Sasaki Hideyoshi|en|Sasaki Hideyoshi|qid=Q7424985|lt=Sasaki Hideo|1=Sasaki Hideyoshi}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1112|en|1112|qid=Q19525|lt=1112|1=1112}}). * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1541|en|1541|qid=Q6516|lt=1541|1=1541}} {{ill|August 10|en|August 10|qid=Q2779|lt=August 10|1=August 10}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Ujitsuna|en|Hōjō Ujitsuna|qid=Q1348386|lt=Hojo Ujitsuna|1=Hōjō Ujitsuna}}, a military commander and son of Hojo Soun (born {{ill|1486|en|1486|qid=Q6646|lt=1486|1=1486}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}} {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}}) – {{ill|Sugae Masasu|ja|菅江真澄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugae Masasu|1=Sugae Masumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11619285}}, an author of travel literature (born {{ill|1754|en|1754|qid=Q7623|lt=1754|1=1754}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|qid=Q7625|lt=1842|1=1842}} {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}}) – {{ill|Yasutake Tanegashira|ja|柳亭種彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasutake Tanegashira|1=Ryūtei Tanehiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q541039}}, a novelist (born {{ill|1783|en|1783|qid=Q7745|lt=1783|1=1783}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1864 {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}}) – {{ill|Kijima Matabē|en|Kijima Matabē|qid=Q6406161|lt=Kurushima Matabei|1=Kijima Matabē}}, a military officer from the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1817|en|1817|qid=Q6958|lt=1817|1=1817}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1864 {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}}) – {{ill|Kusaka Genzui|en|Kusaka Genzui|qid=Q5360999|lt=Kusaka Genrui|1=Kusaka Genzui}}, a military officer from the Chōshū Domain (born {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}}).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|18|7|20|6|19|8|7|0719|qq=}}
